item.title: Six-time NBL champion Jesse Wagstaff gunning for Commonwealth Games gold at 40
item.description: ‘Every time you get the chance to pull on the green and gold it means something special.’

item.title: ‘Cruel’ abortion bill torpedoed after dramatic night in South Australia’s parliament
item.description: It was the third unsuccessful attempt in recent years to tighten the law in the state.

item.title: Aussie jockey Zac Lloyd enjoys maiden Royal Ascot triumph with Moonfall
item.description: The 22-year-old was all smiles after a landmark Royal Ascot winner on his ‘only bullet for the week’.

item.title: Norway’s Crown Princess Mette-Marit undergoes lung transplant days after son sentenced for rape
item.description: The future queen of Norway has been battling chronic lung disease since 2018 and was put on a transplant list 12 days ago.

item.title: First tankers cross Strait of Hormuz sparking tentative relief as US Vice President JD Vance slams Israel for getting in the way of peace
item.description: Trump’s memorandum for peace also called for the ‘permanent termination’ of the war in Lebanon but Vice President JD Vance has since taken aim at behaviour in the Middle East he said was ‘not acceptable’.

item.title: Outgoing Wallabies coach Joe Schmidt explains shock decision to overlook Lukhan Salakaia-Loto
item.description: Incoming coach Les Kiss was consulted heavily before the final call was made to leave out one of his own Queensland stars.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife star Dylan admits his ‘tunnel vision’ for Ally could cost him everything
item.description: On Sunday, the rodeo cowboy’s double date ends in tears as one decision derails the night.

item.title: Cam Waters sprints to Supercars victory as Broc Feeney suffers horror day
item.description: Championship leader Feeney had a race to forget as he veered off the track on lap 20.

item.title: Anne Hathaway announces she’s pregnant with third child
item.description: The busy star shared the news in an Instagram video.

item.title: Tensions erupt as Italian PM slams Trump over ‘completely fabricated’ G7 summit claim
item.description: The ‘serious and offensive’ claim has shattered relations between the US and Italy.

item.title: First case of deadly bird flu H5N1 confirmed in Australia as infected seabird dies
item.description: The strain has reached epidemic proportions in animal populations around the world.

item.title: Paul Avery, ‘All My Children’ and ‘Superman’ actor, dies in New Jersey house fire
item.description: ‘We loved them so much, and they loved us so much, and nobody ever had to wonder if that was so.’

item.title: Same‑sex parents to be formally recognised on South Australian birth certificates after Greens bill passes
item.description: New laws allow two mothers to be listed as mothers for the first time, with retrospective effect.

item.title: Ebola continues to spread in Democratic Republic of Congo camps as aid agency’s defunded
item.description: ‘People didn’t just die like this before.’

item.title: Major theatre show Beetlejuice The Musical axed amid cost pressures
item.description: ‘It is a difficult decision and not one we made lightly.’

item.title: Supercars champion Brodie Kostecki rushed to the doctor after mid-race health battle in Darwin
item.description: The 28-year-old somehow finished on the podium despite needing to be pulled out of his car for urgent medical attention.

item.title: Body cam shows Los Angeles officer fatally shoot dog during call about screaming woman
item.description: Police later learned the woman was screaming in reaction to the Knicks’ win.

item.title: Australia relaxes psychedelic therapy rules despite safety concerns from clinicians
item.description: Some experts warn the changes could put vulnerable patients at risk.

item.title: AI-powered drones could patrol Sydney beaches to prevent shark attacks
item.description: The revolutionary technology could watch the coastline for 12 hours straight.

item.title: Beth Mooney scare mars Australia’s World Cup win over Dutch
item.description: The Aussie veteran has blamed her back stiffness on ‘all the bus travel’ the team has had to do.

item.title: MotoGP championship leader Marco Bezzecchi banned from Czech Grand Prix after striking a marshal twice
item.description: The race official was only trying to help when he was struck in the face by a furious Marco Bezzecchi.

item.title: Man charged over 'anti-Muslim' attacks in Edinburgh, Scotland
item.description: Counterterrorism detectives have charged a man after the shocking incident in Scotland's capital.

item.title: Donated breast milk saving lives of Australia’s tiniest babies as demand surges
item.description: Baby Ava was born at 31 weeks and donated milk helped save her life.

item.title: Norland College: What it takes to become one of the world’s most sought-after nannies
item.description: They have been entrusted the care of royal heirs and can earn around $220,000 each year.

item.title: Cam Waters clinches Triple Crown despite Anton De Pasquale’s flawless victory in Darwin
item.description: The Tickford Racing star did enough to secure the title as Anton De Pasquale won the final race of the weekend.

item.title: A royal restoration at Scotland’s Dumfries House reveals plans for Australia’s Hillview Estate
item.description: 7NEWS was welcomed inside Scotland’s Dumfries House and can reveal the plans to repeat the revitalisation at one of Australia’s stately homes.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife star Lily speaks out after dramatic exit from the show following Dylan and Ally’s kiss
item.description: Lily claims some of the girls are ‘playing the game’.

item.title: Trump’s expletive-laden outburst stalls Iran negotiations in Switzerland
item.description: ‘You won’t even make it back to your f***ing country.’

item.title: Serena Williams relaunches bid to win 24th grand slam title after accepting Wimbledon singles wildcard
item.description: The 44-year-old legend is officially making a stunning comeback to singles tennis, jumping into the fire at Wimbledon.

item.title: Sonny Bill Williams rushed into second surgery after ‘worrying’ spinal cord infection
item.description: The rugby and NRL champion feared for his future when he suffered serious complications following a neck operation.

item.title: Three more arrested as evidence vanishes in Brazil rope swing death
item.description: The 21-year-old was thrown to her death after not being attached to a rope.

item.title: Aussie joyrides steal the show in ‘hilarious’ trophy presentation after T20 series win over Bangladesh
item.description: Two winners posed on bikes for ‘one of the great photos’ before deciding to take off around the ground.

item.title: Wyndham Clark admits ‘shock’ at seeing his father after sealing second US Open title
item.description: Wyndham Clark had no idea his dad had flown through the night to make a rare appearance to see him win.

item.title: ‘Gut wrenching’: Families left out of pocket as tiny home business goes bust
item.description: Kerrie and Brendan Carney say they’re among dozens of families left in the lurch.

item.title: Channel Seven stars shine bright as full list of TV Week Logie Awards nominees is released
item.description: Larry Emdur and Stephen Peacocke are among the stars nominated for this year’s awards, with hit shows Australian Idol and Farmer Wants A Wife also in the running.

item.title: Nicole Kidman and Keith Urban publicly acknowledge each other for first time since split
item.description: The country singer and Australian actress finalised their divorce in January after 19 years of marriage.

item.title: Concern as new anti-scam rules could lead to important texts being labelled spam
item.description: Businesses and services will be required to register branded text messages.

item.title: Sarah Di Lorenzo’s crunchy salmon salad packed with healthy fats
item.description: This crunchy salmon salad is packed with the healthy fats experts want you eating more of.

item.title: ‘A long road ahead’: Family of Coogee shark attack victim share health update
item.description: St Vincent’s Hospital shared a statement on behalf of the young mother’s family, after hundreds took part in a swim to support her.

item.title: Singer Jessie J issues warning after breast cancer surgery and treatment: ‘Changed me forever’
item.description: The British pop star shared a video filmed in hospital.

item.title: The healthy fish pie inspired by Arrnott Olssen’s 50kg weight loss
item.description: Fresh barramundi, coconut curry sauce and sweet potato star in this hearty recipe.

item.title: Kristy Bennett’s family issues extraordinary update after ‘severely disabled’ jockey wakes from 20-day coma
item.description: The 29-year-old has warmed hearts with an incredible act upon waking for the first time since her accident.

item.title: Manu Feildel shares the quick and easy French cassoulet recipe you’ll want all winter
item.description: The TV chef shared a hearty French classic perfect for cooler nights.

item.title: All the scenarios for the Socceroos as they look to secure spot in World Cup knockout stages
item.description: The Aussies are on the brink of qualification, but a tough opposition is looming large.

item.title: Unfiltered: AFL champion Kane Cornes reveals ongoing battle with anxiety
item.description: The Channel 7 footy expert had several brain scans before finding the real reason ‘something was wrong’.

item.title: Tax time check: 46 per cent of Aussies have never topped up their super and it hurts their June 30 return
item.description: Financial advisor James Wrigley describes the carry-forward rule as an ‘easy money win’. Here’s how it works and why the deadline is closer than you think.

item.title: Keir Starmer resigns as UK PM and Labour Party leader
item.description: Britain is bracing for its seventh prime minister in a decade.

item.title: Family of missing magician Daniel Hidden plead as search expands in remote Gold Coast bushland
item.description: The experienced hiker vanished from a place so important to him he tattooed its coordinates on his fingers.

item.title: Smile wiped off Latrell Mitchell’s face as training setback ends State of Origin III hopes
item.description: The superstar has officially been ruled out of playing in the decider after a setback at training.

item.title: AFL’s radical new fixture idea immediately shot down by Nick Riewoldt: ‘Garbage’
item.description: A number of ‘wacky’ new suggestions have been presented to club bosses.

item.title: ‘Essendon person’ desired for next coach with Dean Solomon and James Hird the two likely candidates
item.description: ‘At this early point, it’s hard to see anyone else aside from those two getting this job.’

item.title: Who is Andy Burnham, the lawmaker seeking to replace Keir Starmer
item.description: Andy Burnham’s nickname is inspired by Game of Thrones.

item.title: Self-driving cars are here but Australian road rules aren't keeping up
item.description: The future of driving has arrived, but there's a major problem.

item.title: Marketa Vondrousova banned for four years after refusing drug test
item.description: The former world No.6 has not competed since pulling out of the Adelaide International in January.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Clive Davis, music industry starmaker, has died at 94
item.description: ‘He discovered, mentored, and championed the greatest artists in modern music history, leaving an indelible mark on culture that will endure for generations.’

item.title: Knights forward Asu Kepaoa facing judiciary over homophobic slur during reserve-grade fixture
item.description: The former Wests Tigers player was sent from the field when the referee heard what he’d said.

item.title: Lionel Messi stands alone with all-time World Cup goals record after 2-0 win over Austria
item.description: The Argentinian legend passed two icons with another virtuoso performance and is now peerless at the top.

item.title: Middle East war: Hope and confusion as first day of US-Iran peace talks ends in Switzerland
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz has reopened as talks progress but a glaring issue remains.

item.title: Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson cleared of any wrongdoing after nightclub incident before New Zealand Test
item.description: Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson were both investigated by the independent Cricket Regulator.

item.title: Iran team leaves handwritten note calling for peace in World Cup dressing rooms
item.description: ‘From the ancient Persia of thousands of years ago to the civilised Iran of today.’

item.title: Mystery winner of $1.8 million Saturday Lotto prize yet to come forward
item.description: Players are urged to check their tickets.

item.title: FIFA World Cup clash between France and Iraq suspended at half-time amid wild weather
item.description: ‘Do not travel to Philadelphia Stadium at this time.’

item.title: Major health update for little boy thrown into UK crocodile enclosure
item.description: The three-year-old was attacked by at least one crocodile.

item.title: Locals concerned as fire at Los Angeles warehouse continues to burn after six days
item.description: Most of the city can now smell the noxious smoke billowing out of the warehouse.

item.title: MasterChef favourite Kishwar Chowdhury puts a Bengali twist on the humble sausage roll
item.description: The classic sausage roll is getting a Bengali makeover

item.title: Note connected to disappearance of Nancy Guthrie said she had died, law enforcement sources confirm
item.description: The mother of Melbourne-born TV anchor Savannah Guthrie has been missing since February.

item.title: Radio star Kris Fade turns down offer from ARN to replace Kyle and Jackie O
item.description: The Dubai-based host had emerged as the leading contender to replace the duo after the $200 million contracts were terminated.

item.title: Labor and Greens make deal on negative gearing and capital gains tax reforms
item.description: The government says the reforms will be fairer on workers and first home buyers.

item.title: Passenger arrested as ‘bomb’ comment sparks emergency on Sydney Airport flight
item.description: He pleaded guilty to threatening aviation security and copped a big fine.

item.title: 2026 BYD Atto 2 DM-i expected to arrive within months, could become Australia's cheapest PHEV
item.description: A plug-in hybrid version of the BYD Atto 2 small electric SUV is nearing a local launch, expected in the coming months.

item.title: Major commuter relief as NSW announces lower toll caps in state budget
item.description: The change is tipped to help an extra 200,000 people when introduced.

item.title: Sullivan Robey’s awkward social media history with teammate Ben McKay uncovered
item.description: An ‘abusive message’ resulted in the draftee being blocked by the veteran before he arrived at the club.

item.title: Aussie mum and influencer Danielle Mitchell shares heartbreaking update with fans after difficult pregnancy
item.description: ‘We are at peace with knowing she won’t be fighting and suffering anymore.’

item.title: Why are Norway fans rowing everywhere? Underdog nation steals the show with viral World Cup act
item.description: The nation’s fans are flooding iconic US sites in their thousands performing a unique ritual in unison.

item.title: Honda working on new Hyundai Santa Fe rival for right-hand drive markets – report
item.description: Honda is reportedly working on a new seven-seat SUV to slot in above the CR-V, and it could enter right-hand drive production in 2027.

item.title: Swans lock in superstar Errol Gulden for first game in three months
item.description: The classy midfielder hasn’t played since suffering a dislocated shoulder in Round 1.

item.title: Socceroos fan killed in crash after watching World Cup match at Melbourne’s Federation Square
item.description: The 18-year-old has been remembered for bringing ‘light into the lives of so many’.

item.title: Leading Channel 7 commentator Kate McCarthy slams constant abuse from internet trolls: ‘Leave me alone’
item.description: ‘To constantly be abused and diminished because of my gender is completely f***ed.’

item.title: CCTV captures three-tonne coin press almost crushing Royal Australian Mint worker
item.description: The mint has invested a huge sum to safety improvements following the incident.

item.title: Blow for court case against Bankstown Hospital nurses over anti-Israel video
item.description: The prosecution’s case has taken a major hit after a ruling from a judge on Tuesday.

item.title: NRL great Luke Keary launches passionate plea over Blues’ selection situation for Origin decider
item.description: ‘It doesn’t matter who they pick. It does not matter.’

item.title: Gold Coast art prize rocked by copying claims as organisers move to reclaim $20,000 winnings
item.description: Organisers said they were shocked it had gone unnoticed for more than a year.

item.title: Queensland budget winners and losers revealed as largest cost-of-living relief package announced ahead of Olympic spending
item.description: David Crisafulli’s government has handed down its second budget, bringing relief and no new taxes despite the cost of the 2032 Games.

item.title: Accused war criminal Ben Roberts-Smith allowed to move closer to family while on bail
item.description: The 47-year-old is awaiting trial for alleged war crimes while deployed in Afghanistan.

item.title: Umpire critics to cop whopping fines as AFL lays down new law
item.description: The league has had enough and has told the clubs it has to end.

item.title: Six hantavirus cruise ship passengers cleared to leave Perth quarantine
item.description: Travellers have shared how they passed the time while living under strict conditions.

item.title: Iconic Maserati nameplate dusted off for rebadged Chinese SUV, but a sports car will follow
item.description: An Italian firm has revived another classic brand name to use on rebadged Chinese SUVs, but it says a sports car will come.

item.title: Mitch Moses defends NSW coach Laurie Daley amid State of Origin blame game: ‘Don’t bag him’
item.description: The milestone man has called it ‘crazy’ but doesn’t know where it’s coming from.

item.title: More than 450,000 Aussies set to receive major compensation payout after bungled Robodebt scheme
item.description: Australia’s biggest class action settlement will be paid out to Robodebt victims.

item.title: Inside Australia's new Centre for Disease Control and how doctors are preparing for the next global pandemic
item.description: Inside Australia’s new pandemic centre, scientists are preparing for the next deadly outbreak. But it’s what’s known as ‘disease X’ that keeps this experienced professor working.

item.title: Ford's Ranger-sized affordable electric ute will use a platform that supports right-hand drive
item.description: The US car giant has confirmed the underpinnings of its new ‘affordable’ ute are right-hand drive-capable, meaning it could be sold in Australia.

item.title: Gold Coast girl suffers severe facial burns after copying dangerous squishy toy social media trend
item.description: ‘I could feel my skin coming off.’

item.title: Daryl Braithwaite shocks fans with decision to retire from live shows
item.description: The performer said he had given it ‘much thought and consideration’.

item.title: From a farmers’ market stall to Australia’s best milk: How the internet helped build Gippsland Jersey
item.description: ‘Nothing happens easily in life. You have to work at it. We’ve shown up every single day for 10 years and will continue to. We love it.’

item.title: Collingwood leading push to revolutionise AFL pre-game
item.description: The back-to-the-future move is the brainchild of the club’s fitness boss, who was previously in the NRL.

item.title: Concerns grow for Geelong forward Tyson Stengle after missing VFL flight
item.description: Eyewitnesses have alleged the forward was at a nightclub just days before his missed a flight with the team.

item.title: Family of South Australian fashion icon Carol Foord demands justice after fatal magic mushroom session
item.description: An inquest heard the 72-year-old consumed magic mushrooms to help ease her motor neurone disease symptoms.

item.title: Young children laid to rest in emotional Buddhist ceremony after horror Cabramatta crash
item.description: The kids were tragically hit and killed by a car while walking home with their mum from school pickup.

item.title: Potent sedative found in vape product sold in Melbourne sparking health warning
item.description: Authorities say one person has ended up in hospital.

item.title: H5N1 fears hit South Australia as two birds sent for urgent flu testing
item.description: Poultry producers have moved to protect stocks after two confirmed cases.

item.title: Major heatwave grips Europe as record temperatures disrupt schools and transport networks
item.description: Dozens of people have drowned while trying to cool off from the scorching temperatures.

item.title: Hawthorn coach Sam Mitchell ‘gettable’ for the ‘right price’
item.description: If Hawthorn fans think the master coach is locked in for the next 10 years, they don’t fully understand how he ticks.

item.title: Gout Gout pulls out of Prefontaine Classic in USA and heads home
item.description: The rising superstar has had to leave the US and is suddenly on his way home.

item.title: Victorian police officer found guilty of tasering suspect nine times in Warragul arrest
item.description: ‘Hands behind your back now, or you get f***ing sprayed.’

item.title: Savannah Guthrie responds to update on missing mum Nancy, renews plea for answers
item.description: ‘We are in agony. We cannot be at peace.’

item.title: 2026 Honda HR-V review
item.description: The Honda HR-V is a solid option in the small SUV segment, but there are some cons to go with its many pros.
